name: UXCam Mobile App Analytics API
what_it_does: UXCam mobile app analytics REST API for product and UX teams to capture session recordings, screen heatmaps, user journey maps, and crash analytics to understand and optimize mobile app user experience. Enables AI agents to manage session recording retrieval and filtering for mobile UX research automation, handle screen heatmap analysis and touch point aggregation for UI optimization automation, access user journey and flow analysis for conversion funnel automation, retrieve crash report correlation with session recordings for debugging automation, manage event and interaction tracking for behavioral analytics automation, handle user segment creation from behavioral attributes for targeted analysis automation, access funnel analysis and drop-off identification for conversion optimization automation, retrieve user feedback and in-app survey correlation with session data for research automation, manage session tagging and annotation for UX research organization automation, and integrate UXCam with Amplitude, Mixpanel, Segment, Crashlytics, and analytics platforms for end-to-end mobile UX insight automation.
use_cases: Analyzing user sessions from mobile UX research agents
Mapping touch heatmaps from UI optimization agents
Correlating crashes with sessions from debugging agents
Analyzing funnels from mobile conversion agents
not_for: Web application session recording (use Hotjar, FullStory, or Mouseflow for web)
A/B testing and feature flags (use Optimizely or LaunchDarkly)
Performance monitoring and APM (use Datadog Mobile or Firebase Performance)
best_when: A mobile product or UX team wanting AI agents to automate session recording analysis, screen heatmap extraction, user journey mapping, and crash-to-session correlation through UXCam's mobile-first analytics platform.
avoid_when: SDK INSTALLATION REQUIRED IN MOBILE APP: UXCam requires native SDK installed in iOS and Android app for session capture; API access is for data retrieval and management of captured sessions, not for remote session control; automated mobile UX research requires mobile engineering to install and configure SDK in app release cycle. SESSION RECORDING STORAGE RETENTION BY PLAN: UXCam session recording retention varies by plan (7 days to 12+ months); automated UX research workflows that reference old sessions must verify retention period; automated session analysis that attempts to retrieve sessions beyond plan retention returns empty results without clear expiry error. PII IN MOBILE SESSION RECORDINGS: UXCam session recordings may capture PII if forms or profile screens are not properly masked; automated session recording deployment requires configuration of screen masking rules before recording sensitive screens; automated session sharing or export without PII masking creates privacy compliance risk under GDPR and CCPA.

auth.notes: UXCam uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ (offices in London and Berlin). Founded 2014 by Florian Gosselin, Antoine Potier, and Josh Dickson. Backed by Salesforce Ventures, Earlybird VC ($25M+ raised). Products: Session recording, screen heatmaps, user journey maps, crash analytics, funnel analysis, screen flow analysis. SDK: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter. Integrations: Amplitude, Mixpanel, Segment, Crashlytics, Firebase, Intercom. GDPR. SOC2. Serves mobile product teams. Competes with Contentsquare, FullStory Mobile, and Smartlook for mobile session analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (2,000 sessions/month, 7-day retention, basic features)
pricing.paid_tiers: Startup ($299/mo), Growth (custom), Enterprise (custom); based on session volume
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Salesforce Ventures/Earlybird backed. Free tier (2K sessions). Session-volume pricing. GDPR, SOC2.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; session and analytics queries throttled; no webhooks — polling for new sessions

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING FOR NEW SESSION AVAILABILITY: UXCam provides no webhooks for session capture completion; automated UX research workflows cannot receive push notification of new sessions; automated session analysis must poll session list with timestamp filter for newly captured sessions; session processing delay (5-30 minutes after capture) affects polling freshness

SCREEN NAME CONFIGURATION REQUIRED FOR HEATMAP ACCURACY: UXCam heatmaps are organized by screen name; screen name accuracy depends on SDK configuration in app; automated heatmap analysis that references screen names must account for developer-defined screen naming convention; automated heatmap aggregation using inconsistent screen names creates fragmented heatmap data across app versions

SESSION SAMPLING FOR HIGH-VOLUME APPS: UXCam may sample sessions for high-traffic apps on lower plans; automated session analysis must account for sampling rate; automated funnel analysis that assumes 100% session capture on sampled plan creates understated funnel volume metrics

CRASH SESSION CORRELATION REQUIRES CRASHLYTICS INTEGRATION: UXCam crash-to-session linking requires Crashlytics or Firebase Crashlytics integration configured; automated crash debugging workflow using UXCam session replay must verify crash analytics integration is active; standalone UXCam deployment without crash integration cannot correlate crash reports to session recordings

SESSION RECORDING VIDEO URL EXPIRY: UXCam session recording video URLs have time-limited access; automated session sharing or archival must download or store recordings before URL expiry; automated UX research pipeline that caches session video URLs for later viewing encounters expired URL access errors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mobile analytics. GDPR, SOC2, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Mobile session recording and user interaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mobile analytics. GDPR, SOC2, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Session recording and behavioral data.
